jedis.signature: List<GeoCoordinate> geopos(final byte[] key, final byte[]... members)

returns.description: A list of GeoCoordinate representing longitude and latitude (x,y) of each member name passed as argument to the command.

jedis.signature: List<GeoCoordinate> geopos(final String key, String... members)

returns.description: A list of GeoCoordinate representing longitude and latitude (x,y) of each member name passed as argument to the command.
A list of GeoCoordinate representing longitude and latitude (x,y) of each member name passed as argument to the command.

params.name: key
params.description: the key of the geo set.

returns.description: a list of GeoCoordinatess representing the x,y position of each element specified in the arguments. For missing elements null is returned.

ioredis.signature: geopos(...args: [, key: RedisKey, ...members: (string | Buffer | number)[], callback: Callback<([longitude: string, latitude: string] | null)[]>, ])

nredisstack_sync.signature: GeoPosition(RedisKey key, RedisValue[] members, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The command returns an array where each element is a two elements array representing longitude and latitude (x,y) of each member name passed as argument to the command. Non-existing elements are reported as NULL elements of the array.
